positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring interconnected elements of stylized mountains, abstract constellations, and blooming flora. The design should be executed in a clean, high-contrast linework style, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Utilize a deep navy blue and burnt orange color palette against a white background. The composition must feature strong central symmetry and clear negative space. Include repeating abstract shapes inspired by Art Deco and natural forms, creating a sense of whimsical yet sophisticated cosmic wanderlust. Vector illustration quality, minimalist modern aesthetic, crisp lines, graphic design, woodcut engraving style.
